title: Anoplophytum lineare
taxonomy: Anoplophytum lineare is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Anoplophytum, which belongs to the family Asparagaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia. Anoplophytum lineare is a type of climbing plant, also known as a vine. It is found in countries such as China, India, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
uses: Anoplophytum lineare is a plant species native to China, and it has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
